meaning: n.相似物,类似情况,对等的人
examples: No conversion from analogue to digital data is needed.
Because no modern land animals even approach sauropod size, scientists have also lacked a living analogue to use as a guide to possible sauropod behavior.
The closest living analogue might be a sponge.
Northern Ireland is the last part of the UK to make the switch from analogue.
The books have recently changed over from an analogue to a digital service, said Ms Jackson.
